scripts.dev: cd ../.. && npm run build && cd packages/electron && npm run build && electron .
scripts.pack:win: npm run prepack && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win && npm run postpack
scripts.pack:mac: npm run prepack && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac && npm run postpack
scripts.pack:linux: npm run prepack && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux && npm run postpack
